additional_rules.description: Cronus SPCP 30-year fixed conforming with up to 2.5 better in pricing. $1,500 closing cost assistance. Fannie/Freddie guidelines (DU/LP).
additional_rules.closing_cost_assistance: $1,500 CCA for Section B and C costs
additional_rules.income_limit: Borrower income ≤120% of MSA MFI (not verifiable from property data)
additional_rules.underwriting: Inhouse underwriting, AUS with Overlays, Fannie/Freddie DU/LP guidelines

additional_rules.description: Cronus HomeRun SPCP with up to 2.5 + 2.75 better in pricing. Same HomeRun overlays apply. $1,500 closing cost assistance.
additional_rules.closing_cost_assistance: $1,500 CCA for Section B and C costs
additional_rules.income_limit: Borrower income ≤120% of MSA MFI, BUT no income limit if property is in LMI tract
additional_rules.no_current_property: Borrower and non-borrowing spouse cannot own any residential property at closing

additional_rules.description: Cronus HomeReady SPCP with Home Ready pricing + up to 2.5 better. Must qualify as HomeReady per DU findings. $1,500 closing cost assistance.
additional_rules.pricing_incentive: Home Ready pricing + up to 2.5 better
additional_rules.closing_cost_assistance: $1,500 CCA for Section B and C costs
additional_rules.income_limit: Borrower income ≤80% of AMI (Fannie Mae AMI lookup, not verifiable from property data)
additional_rules.underwriting: Must qualify as HomeReady per DU findings, Fannie Mae guidelines

additional_rules.description: Cronus Home Possible SPCP with Home Possible pricing + up to 2.5 better. Must qualify as Home Possible per LP findings. $1,500 closing cost assistance.
additional_rules.pricing_incentive: Home Possible pricing + up to 2.5 better
additional_rules.closing_cost_assistance: $1,500 CCA for Section B and C costs
additional_rules.income_limit: Borrower income ≤80% of AMI (not verifiable from property data)
additional_rules.underwriting: Must qualify as Home Possible per LP findings, Freddie Mac guidelines

general_notes: GMCC Special Conforming (Cronus SPCP) offers special pricing for properties in Designated Majority-Minority Census Tracts (DMMCT) within eligible MSAs.
DMMCT = Black Population or Hispanic Population > 50% of tract, OR Black + Hispanic combined > 50%.
All 4 sub-programs share the same 16 eligible MSA areas across CA, CO, DC, FL, IL, NJ-PA, NY, NY-NJ, TX.
$1,500 Closing Cost Assistance (CCA) available for Section B and C costs on all SPCP programs.
Inhouse underwriting — investor approval required BEFORE doc. AUS with Overlays. No exceptions.
Doc date must be AFTER the investor CTC date. No exception.
Income limits vary by sub-program: 30yr Fixed and HomeRun use 120% MFI; HomeReady and Home Possible use 80% AMI. These are borrower-level criteria not verifiable from property data.
HomeRun SPCP: if property is in LMI tract, there is no income limit requirement.
Conforming loan amounts only — no high-balance or jumbo.
